text:
ByOscar Hartzog

If you purchase an independently reviewed product or service through a link on our website, Rolling Stone may receive an affiliate commission.

The men’s singles final is set at the2024 Paris Olympics, pitting world No. 3 Carlos Alcaraz against No. 2 Novak Djokovic for a blockbuster cross-generational battle.



The top-ranked players have met six times in professional matches, with the head-to-head series tied 3-3. Neither player has won a medal at theOlympics, and there’s (somewhat poetic) potential for history to be made no matter who wins: Alcaraz would be the youngest person to win gold in the Olympic men’s singles tournament, and Djokovic would be the oldest.

If you’re looking to watch the massive Olympictennisfinal online, read on. Below is a quick guide on how to livestream the Alcaraz vs. Djokovic Olympics final online, plus a way to watch Alcaraz vs. Djokovic for free.

The Alcaraz vs. Djokovic Olympics final is airing live on NBC. Cord-cutters have a few options for watching the Olympics tennis final without cable, includingPeacockor anylive TV streaming servicethat carries NBC. Below are the best options, including details on free trial info and pricing:

Those without cable can watch the Alcaraz vs. Djokovic Olympics final online with a free trial toDirecTV Stream, which carries NBC in all of its packages. After the service’sfive-day trialends, you’ll be billed at $79.99 a month for the basic package.



DirecTV Stream is one of the most comprehensive live TV streaming services with up to 160+ channels, including local channels, regional sports networks, and all popular national channels. Packages start at $79.99 a month and all subscriptions start with a five-day free trial.

fubois another great live TV streamer that carries NBC for an Alcaraz vs. Djokovic livestream. The service starts with aseven-day free trial, and costs $79.99 a month after that.



fubo’s massive streaming plans carry up to 275+ channels, and you can get even more depending on your location. Packages start at $79.99 a month, and you get seven days to try the service for free.

Hulu + Live TValso offers NBC livestreams for Olympics tennis coverage. You getthree days for freeto start, and then you’ll need to pay $76.99 a month if you choose to keep the service.



Hulu + Live TV bundles together Hulu’s on-demand library and over 95 live TV channels, including local channels and almost all popular national channels. Subscriptions also include ESPN+ and Disney+ at no additional cost. Hulu + Live TV costs $76.99 a month after a three-day free trial.

Peacockis a much more affordable way to watch the Alcaraz vs. Djokovic Olympics final online, with subscriptions costing just $7.99 a month, although it doesn’t offer a free trial like the above options.



Peacock offers both live and on-demand content, including sports like WWE, Golf, and Olympics, and series likeThe OfficeandYellowstone. Subscriptions start at $7.99 a month.

If you want to watch the Alcaraz vs. Djokovic Olympics final for free, use a free trial fromDirecTV Stream,fubo, orHulu + Live TV. All of these free trials will get you a free Alcaraz vs. Djokovic tennis livestream — as long as you cancel the free trial before it ends.

The Alcaraz vs. Djokovic Olympics tennis final is happening on Sunday, August 4 at 3 a.m. PT / 6 a.m. ET. There will be replays, or you can use the DVR features included in DirecTV Stream, fubo, and Hulu + Live TV’s plans.

Oddsmakers are giving Alcaraz the edge in Sunday’s match with a moneyline of -240 against Djokovic’s +195 (FanDuel). Just a couple of months ago, Alcaraz won the 2024French Open, which takes place on the same court (Rolland-Garros) where he’ll meet Djokovic for the Olympics final. The Serb had to withdraw from this year’s French Open due to an injury.

No matter how you look at it, Sunday’s men’s singles final between Alcaraz and Djokovic is massive. The pair are tied head-to-head with three wins each — their last meeting being just a month ago at theWimbledonfinal, which Alcaraz won. The winner on Sunday will make history as the youngest (Alcaraz) or oldest (Djokovic) to win gold in the Olympics men’s singles tournament. Here are the results of the duo’s six matches against each other:

2024 Wimbledon – Final: Alcaraz wins 6-2 6-2 7-6(4)2023 ATP Finals – Semi-final: Djokovic wins 6-3 6-22023 Cincinnati Masters – Final: Djokovic wins 5-7 7-6(7) 7-6(4)2023 Wimbledon – Final: Alcaraz wins 1-6 7-6(6) 6-1 3-6 6-42023 Roland-Garros – Semi-final: Djokovic wins 6-3 5-7 6-1 6-12022 Madrid Masters – Semi-final: Alcaraz wins 6-7(5) 7-5 7-6(5)

We want to hear it. Send us a tip using our anonymous form.

title: How to Watch Alcaraz vs. Djokovic Olympics Final Online for Free
author: Oscar Hartzog
description: Here’s how to watch Alcaraz vs. Djokovic online during the Olympics tennis final, including a way to livestream Alcaraz vs. Djokovic for free.
